next_action: Populate cohort data after first 100 customers; calibrate RFM thresholds after 500 customers; validate lifecycle stage transition rates from real data

revisions.what_changed: Initial workshop: 13 Danilo content tabs consolidated into 4 content files (crm_architecture.md, lifecycle_and_segmentation.md, ltv_and_cohort_analysis.md, crm_metrics_and_dashboards.md). OpKit OK-M19-001 created. Key additions: non-linear lifecycle paths (U3), Minimum Viable CRM with 3 Day-1 flows (U2), at-risk sub-segmentation (U5), churn risk score formula (U7), confidence intervals for cohort analysis (U1), founder daily CRM check-in (U8), customer-count tool triggers (U4), seasonality in metrics (U6).
revisions.quality_rationale: Strong CRM architecture (model-as-CRM concept). A-grade segmentation with dual-layer approach. B-grade LTV/cohort framework (rigorous but all data is empty). B+ metrics with founder-appropriate workflow. D-grade on all actual numbers (pre-revenue estimates). 8 upgrades applied from dialogue.
